{{Quote|We don't know what it was, sir, but it took out three platoons. We can't let the Colicoids get these things offplanet.|Stec, after a failed strike at Colla IV|<ref name="NEGD" />}}
The [[Advanced Recon Commando/Legends|Advanced Recon Commando]] named '''Stec''' was an [[Alpha-class Advanced Recon Commando|Alpha-class]] [[Clone Sergeant/Legends|sergeant]] who fought in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].<ref name="NEGD" /> A [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] of the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] that was born in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]],<ref name="GORW">''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]''</ref> Stec<ref name="NEGD" />—along with the rest of the one hundred ARC troopers in the [[Alpha-class Advanced Recon Commando|Alpha-class]]—was personally trained by the [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]]. He served in the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic's]] [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], which [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|launched]] in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].<ref name="Episode II">{{Film|II}}</ref> Throughout the war, he participated in the [[Battle of Hypori/Legends|Battle of Hypori]] along with the rest of the [[The Muunilinst 10|Muunilinst 10]], where the ARC Troopers were sent to rescue the surviving [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] from [[General/Legends|General]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]].<ref name="CW20" />

==Biography==
===Early Life===
In the year [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], the [[Kaminoan/Legends|Kaminoans]] began building a [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|clone army]] for the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]]. Stec was one of the 100 Alpha-class Advanced Reconnaissance Commandos created from the genome of his clone template and bounty hunter [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]]. In addition to the flash training, in which all soldiers received a basic lesson on the development of their military abilities, Fett subjected Stec and the Advanced Reconnaissance Commandos to separate training into ideal special mission groups, capable of operating solely behind enemy lines due to their unique abilities. Because of their lack of obedience, the ARC generation after Jango Fett's departure from Kamino was transferred to stasis and only reactivated two months after the beginning of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] during the [[First Battle of Kamino|Battle of Kamino]]. Stec was integrated as a sergeant in the command operations of the Grand Army of the Republic.

===Clone Wars===
====Battle of Hypori====
[[File:CW_Chapter_21.png|thumb|right|250px|Stec wielding a Z-6 on [[Hypori/Legends|Hypori]]]]
Following the [[Battle of Muunilinst/Legends|Battle of Muunilinst]], ARC captain [[Fordo]] was given the task of carrying out an emergency rescue operation on the planet [[Hypori/Legends|Hypori]] to evacuate a group of Jedi who were under attack by forces led by [[General/Legends|General]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]], the [[Supreme Commander of the Droid Armies/Legends|Supreme Commander of the Droid Armies]]. Stec was part of this task force, and carried a Z-6 rotary blaster, a heavy weapon for infantry support during missions with specific tactical requirements.

In the approach of their [[Low Altitude Assault Transport/infantry/Legends|LAAT/i gunship]] to the wreck of the [[Acclamator-class transgalactic military assault ship/Legends|''Acclamator''-class assault ship]] where the Jedi were, the soldiers prepared their equipment for the upcoming deployment. When the gunship reached the inside of the destroyed assault ship, Stec and the rest of the Advanced Reconnaissance Commandos gathered behind Fordo. While two of the ARC Troopers were searching for the signs of life that Fordo had discovered in the ruins, Fordo ordered the other clone troopers to fan out. In the location where he had localized two other life signs, the soldiers witnessed a lightsaber duel between Grievous and the last standing Jedi, [[Ki-Adi-Mundi/Legends|Ki-Adi-Mundi]]. When Grievous attempted to finish off the [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]], he noticed the approaching clones, who immediately opened fire on him. Grievous was initially forced to flee further into the wreck in order to escape the ongoing firing of the clones, but eventually attacked the clones, cutting down four of them with his lightsabers. Fordo then called in the gunship for fire support. While Grievous retreated from the gunship's bombardment, Fordo ordered a retreat to ensure the survival of the three rescued Jedi; [[Shaak Ti/Legends|Shaak Ti]], [[Aayla Secura/Legends|Aayla Secura]], and Ki-Adi-Mundi. In the process, Stec sat down at the edge of the passenger cabin in order to be able to hold back Grievous after the Jedi were loaded onto the gunship. All three Jedi and the clones escaped and survived.<ref name="CW21">'{{CW|21}}</ref>

====Battle of Colla IV====
Late into the war, he participated attempted to destroy the production facilities of the Colicoid factory on [[Colla IV/Legends|Colla IV]], thereby destroying one of the most important companies for the production of battle droids for the confederation of independent systems. Stec belonged to the four battle groups, infiltrating the colicoid workshop surrounded by a protective shield. When the soldiers reached the inner wall of the establishment, they were attacked by a Scorpenek Annihilator droids. With his laser cannon he destroyed a wall of Durabeton, behind which the soldiers had sought cover, and destroyed within three minutes three of the four battle groups. The remaining soldiers, including Stec, withdrew from the factory. Afterwards, the ARC soldier told his superiors about the failed attempt on Colla IV. Although he did not know what kind of droids his clone brothers had fought and recommended that he not allow the colicoids to continue breeding on that planet.

==Equipment==
Stec wielded high-powered rapid-firing weapons such as the [[Z-6 rotary blaster cannon/Legends|Z-6 rotary blaster cannon]] and [[DC-17m Interchangeable Weapon System]]<ref name="CSWE Z-6">{{CSWECite|III|365|Z-6 rotary blaster cannon}}</ref> He wore distinguished blue [[Phase I clone trooper armor/Legends|Phase I clone trooper armor]]. He also wore a skirt-like [[Kama/Legends|kama]] that dampened blasts, had a [[Rangefinder/Legends|rangefinder]] attached to his helmet, and wore a blue command shoulder pauldron.

==Behind the scenes==
Stec first appeared as an unnamed clone in [[Chapter 20 (Star Wars: Clone Wars)|Chapter 20]] of the ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars]]'' animated television series.<ref name="CW20" /> Stec was first named in the reference book, ''[[The New Essential Guide to Droids]]''.<ref name="NEGD" /> It was later established in the ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' that clone seen in ''Star Wars: Clone Wars'' was Stec.<ref name="CSWE Z-6" /> Stec's rank has been inconsistently stated to be both a lieutenant<ref name="GAR Guide">{{InsiderCite|84|Guide to the Grand Army of the Republic}}</ref> and a sergeant.<ref name="CSWE Stec" /> The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia states that Stec was a sergeant during his mission to hypori,<ref name="CSWE Z-6" /> while the ''[[Guide to the Grand Army of the Republic]]'' states that Fordo led ten lieutenants during the mission.<ref name="GAR Guide" />
